OmniIntegrationProcedure.name: ClinicianFetchServiceAccsAndHPFRF

omniProcessElements.name: Response
omniProcessElements.propertySetConfig: { "executionConditionalFormula" : "", "useFormulas" : true, "additionalOutput" : { "ReturnList:ServiceAccountRecs" : "=LIST(%ReturnList:ServiceAccountRecs%)", "ReturnList:HPFRecs" : "=LIST(%DRFetchdata:HPFRecs%)", "ReturnList:CurrentAccountRec" : "%DRFetchdata:CurrentAccountRec%", "showHPFRecs" : "=IF(ISBLANK(DRFetchdata:HPFRecs), false, true)", "ReturnList:FilteredHPFRecs" : "=LIST(%filteredList%)" }, "returnOnlyAdditionalOutput" : true, "returnFullDataJSON" : false, "responseFormat" : "JSON", "responseJSONPath" : "", "responseJSONNode" : "", "sendJSONPath" : "", "sendJSONNode" : "", "responseDefaultData" : { }, "vlcResponseHeaders" : { }, "show" : null, "label" : "ResponseAction1", "disOnTplt" : false }

childElements.name: DM_CreateHPFRecs
childElements.propertySetConfig: { "executionConditionalFormula" : "CreateRecords == true", "failureConditionalFormula" : "", "failOnStepError" : true, "useFormulas" : true, "additionalInput" : { "ContactId" : "=QUERY(\"Select PersonContactId from Account where Id = '{0}'\",%ContactId%}", "selectedServiceRecords" : "%selectedServiceRecords%", "FacilityTitle" : "%FacilityTitle%", "TimeTypeSelect" : "%TimeTypeSelect%", "PracticeTypeSelect" : "%PracticeTypeSelect%", "EffectiveFromDate" : "%EffectiveFromDate%" }, "additionalOutput" : { }, "failureResponse" : { }, "sendOnlyAdditionalInput" : true, "returnOnlyAdditionalOutput" : false, "returnOnlyFailureResponse" : false, "responseJSONPath" : "", "responseJSONNode" : "", "sendJSONPath" : "", "sendJSONNode" : "", "bundle" : "DMCreateHPFRecs", "chainOnStep" : false, "actionMessage" : "", "show" : null, "label" : "DataMapperPostAction1", "disOnTplt" : false }

OmniIntegrationProcedure.propertySetConfig: { "linkToExternalObject" : "", "trackingCustomData" : { }, "includeAllActionsInResponse" : false, "columnsPropertyMap" : [ ], "relationshipFieldsMap" : [ ], "labelSingular" : "", "labelPlural" : "", "description" : "", "nameColumn" : "", "rollbackOnError" : false, "chainableQueriesLimit" : 50, "chainableDMLStatementsLimit" : null, "chainableCpuLimit" : 2000, "chainableHeapSizeLimit" : null, "chainableDMLRowsLimit" : null, "chainableQueryRowsLimit" : null, "chainableSoslQueriesLimit" : null, "chainableActualTimeLimit" : null, "additionalChainableResponse" : { }, "queueableChainableQueriesLimit" : 120, "queueableChainableCpuLimit" : 40000, "queueableChainableHeapSizeLimit" : 6, "ttlMinutes" : 5, "mockResponseMap" : { } }
